spec.precondition: requires valid(buffer) && buffer != NULL && ggml_backend_buffer_get_base(buffer) is valid && ggml_backend_buffer_get_alignment(buffer) is a power of 2 && ggml_backend_buffer_get_alignment(buffer) > 0
spec.postcondition: (ensures valid(result) && result.buffer == buffer && result.base == ggml_backend_buffer_get_base(buffer) && result.alignment == ggml_backend_buffer_get_alignment(buffer) && result.alignment > 0 && (result.alignment & (result.alignment - 1)) == 0 && result.offset >= 0 && result can be used with ggml_tallocr_alloc) && (result.buffer == buffer && result.base == ggml_backend_buffer_get_base(buffer) && result.alignment == ggml_backend_buffer_get_alignment(buffer) && result.offset == aligned_offset(result.base, 0, result.alignment))
